examples: The pig is also unclean; although it has a split hoof, it does not chew the cud.
And the pig, though it has a split hoof completely divided, does not chew the cud; it is unclean for you.
The cow, chewing its cud in knee-high grass, is utterly content. Yet we thirst for God even in the midst of plenty.
We will teach birds to fly, and fishes to swim, and ruminants to chew the cud.
On the hillside above, a few cattle peer down on us with cud-chewing distain.
